data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the outcome related to the audit trail showing who approved actions. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete data or API responses that confirm the system's ability to track approvals or generate an audit trail. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not address this specific requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict regarding the validation of this scenario.
gaps: No evidence confirming the system can generate an audit trail of approvals.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the audit trail functionality.
